title: Hanli Rose-Innes retires
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Earlier this year, Union High School bid a bittersweet farewell to one of its most beloved educators, Hanli Rose-Innes, who went on early retirement after her 15th year at Union.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Earlier this year, Union High School bid a bittersweet farewell to one of its most beloved educators, Hanli Rose-Innes, who went on early retirement after her 15th year at Union."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"To say that Rose-Innes was a stalwart of the school would be an understatement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She brought to the school an incredible mix of dedication, enthusiasm and warmth.","html":"She brought to the school an incredible mix of dedication, enthusiasm and warmth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hard-working, organised and bursting with energy, she poured her heart into every lesson, every event, and every child.","html":"Hard-working, organised and bursting with energy, she poured her heart into every lesson, every event, and every child."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the primary department’s creative arts teacher, she earned a reputation for her impeccable planning and creativity.","html":"As the primary department’s creative arts teacher, she earned a reputation for her impeccable planning and creativity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her lessons were not only engaging and imaginative, but also supported by next-level handouts.","html":"Her lessons were not only engaging and imaginative, but also supported by next-level handouts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But Rose-Innes' impact went far beyond her classroom.","html":"But Rose-Innes' impact went far beyond her classroom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you ever found yourself seated near her in the staff room, you were in for a treat. Laughter was guaranteed, and soon enough, her little corner became known affectionately as the “naughty corner” – a hub of stories and humour.","html":"If you ever found yourself seated near her in the staff room, you were in for a treat. Laughter was guaranteed, and soon enough, her little corner became known affectionately as the “naughty corner” – a hub of stories and humour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She had a talent for lifting spirits and creating a sense of community, one cup of Earl Grey tea at a time.","html":"She had a talent for lifting spirits and creating a sense of community, one cup of Earl Grey tea at a time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She brought this same heart and thoughtfulness to her roles beyond the classroom, whether it was as a speaker at the school’s mother-and-daughter tea or the ever-gracious organiser of the annual Grade 7 ladies’ tea.","html":"She brought this same heart and thoughtfulness to her roles beyond the classroom, whether it was as a speaker at the school’s mother-and-daughter tea or the ever-gracious organiser of the annual Grade 7 ladies’ tea."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rose-Innes was never one to stand on the sidelines.","html":"Rose-Innes was never one to stand on the sidelines."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She coached netball, launched the school’s philosophy club, served on the school governing body and devotedly championed chess."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She believed deeply in applied learning - ensuring that her learners not only studied education, but experienced it.","html":"She believed deeply in applied learning - ensuring that her learners not only studied education, but experienced it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In her classroom, fun met focus and where children felt seen and heard.","html":"In her classroom, fun met focus and where children felt seen and heard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her colleagues remember her not just for her professionalism, but for her caring personality. Feeling unwell?","html":"Her colleagues remember her not just for her professionalism, but for her caring personality. Feeling unwell?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She always had a trusty boereraat (home remedy) at the ready.","html":"She always had a trusty boereraat (home remedy) at the ready."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Need a smile? A warm chat with her did the trick. She had a way of making everyone feel special - and that, perhaps, is what will be missed the most.","html":"Need a smile? A warm chat with her did the trick. She had a way of making everyone feel special - and that, perhaps, is what will be missed the most."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hanli Rose-Innes was more than an educator; she was the life, heart and soul of Union in many ways.","html":"Hanli Rose-Innes was more than an educator; she was the life, heart and soul of Union in many ways."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She leaves behind a legacy of laughter, learning and love - and a void that cannot easily be filled.","html":"She leaves behind a legacy of laughter, learning and love - and a void that cannot easily be filled."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We hope retirement brings her as much joy as she gave to Union. The school misses her deeply.","html":"We hope retirement brings her as much joy as she gave to Union. The school misses her deeply."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
